response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically mismatches the provided JSON reference for 'Hyper Jumpin''. The audio sings '飛び越えよう' (tobikoeyou) instead of '飛び出そう' (tobidasou) and follows a different verse structure than the provided lyrics. Per the 'Wrong Song/Verse' rule, I have prioritized the audio and on-screen text as the ground truth. The video contains a looping promotional trailer with varying on-screen information; I have transcribed the vocals and relevant text for the duration of this segment, ensuring timestamps are tightly wrapped to the audio waveform and split at natural pauses.
